text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final day of summer camp is here, and Tosen
Jordan is off and running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Jordan! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Now that was some nice Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: She's as fast as ever...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is our last day! We've got to give it
everything we've got and finish with no regrets!
So let's do one more run after our break!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is Tosen Jordan running with Sakura
Bakushin O again?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure they have different distance
aptitudes... Someone really ought to put a stop to
this ridiculousness. It's not helping either of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I guess everyone has an opinion, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And yet, Bakushin O's stamina and Jordan's speed
have both increased.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'd say their training has been worthwhile for both
of them. Don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehe, right on the money.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yooo, Jordan! I wanna join! ☆ Bakushin! Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And there goes another one. You wanna go too,
City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know, I think I will.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! Get ready for my epic runaway on the
next Bakushin! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You too, Helios? If all three of us run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I don't mind! More Bakushin is never a bad thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why not let the two of us join for a
five-person Bakushin?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's Palmer! And City too?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's right. Now, let's do it. Bakushin, Bakushin.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin, Bakushiiin! I'll be taking the lead, thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What is happening?
choice_data_list: If you don't hurry, you won't get in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?! But I don't want that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the final day of summer camp, the word
"Bakushin" can be heard echoing along the entire
beach.
